name: pr-draft-summary
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|branch|repo |
 policy: evidence,review-ready,deterministic-output |
 lens: minto-pyramid |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: REVIEW_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: What body of changes to summarize.

required_inputs.name: CHANGE_INTENT
required_inputs.description: What the change set was trying to accomplish.

required_inputs.name: BASE_REF_HINT
required_inputs.description: Expected comparison base when not using the default upstream.

required_inputs.name: NOTES_POLICY
required_inputs.description: How much operational context to include.
